metadata.intent: Count the total number of unique customers in the system.

how many customers are in the system?.fullText: Our enterprise system currently contains **8 distinct customer records**. This count reflects all unique business partners registered within our system.

metadata.intent: Show the journal entry for billing document 90504248.
metadata.sql: SELECT T2.* FROM billing_document_headers AS T1 JOIN journal_entry_items_accounts_receivable AS T2 ON T1.accountingDocument = T2.accountingDocument WHERE T1.billingDocument = '90504248';

show all deliveries for customer 3100001.fullText:
The Journal Entry for Billing Document **90504248** has been successfully identified.

**Accounting Document 9400000249** was generated on **2025-04-02** within Company Code **ABCD** to record the financial impact of this billing event.

Specifically, this entry reflects a debit of **765 INR** to G/L Account **15500020** (typically an Accounts Receivable account) for Customer **320000083**. This indicates that the customer has been charged for the amount invoiced.
